title: cleyera japonica var. japonica
intro: Cleyera japonica var. japonica, also known as the Japanese Cleyera or Japanese Quinine Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cleyera japonica var. japonica include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
